checks.description: Ready signal must assert within an upper bound after inputs are presented.
notes: Uses the conservative 20‑cycle bound derived from the counter maximum.
checks.pass_condition: rdy becomes high no later than 20 clock cycles after the inputs a and b become stable.
checks.trigger_condition: When a legal input pair is applied and the module is not in reset.

checks.description: Product output must equal the mathematical multiplication of inputs a and b when rdy is asserted.
notes: Reference multiplication is performed by the testbench model.
checks.pass_condition: When rdy is high, p equals a * b (unsigned 8‑bit multiplication) without X or Z values.
checks.trigger_condition: After a legal input stimulus and subsequent observation period.
